tracks.rawText: 1:59Tailored Blackjackv5.5Cool jazz heist masterpiece, walking bass, brush drums, Rhodes piano, muted trumpet, vibraphone, Las Vegas casino lounge, high-end luxury, effortless swagger, tailored suits, diamond heist, playful sophistication, charismatic confidence, night city lights, smooth criminal elegance, vintage jazz recording, cinematic cool, impossibly stylish, late-night victory atmosphere1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Tailored Blackjack

tracks.rawText: 2:37Vibrato Alibiv5.5Sleek heist-score groove at 110 BPM: muted upright bass, brushed drums, jazzy electric piano, and clipped guitar comping over tense minor-key horn stabs, Spy-funk percussion, vibraphone runs, analog synth pulses, and wide stereo reverb create a cool, high-stakes lounge texture1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:11Velvet Wagerv5.5Glossy luxury casino dance-pop with sleek synth arpeggios, muted brass stabs, velvet electric piano, and a punchy four-on-the-floor kick, Ticking hi-hats, subby bass pulses, filtered string pads, and champagne-pop vocal chops create a seductive, high-stakes texture with polished reverb and late-night tension1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:34Salted Tensionv5.5Dark nautical organ piece built around warped pipe-organ drones, detuned reed stops, and creaking low pedal tones, Unstable tape flutter, foghorn-like brass swells, sub-bass rumble, and sparse tom hits create a precarious drift, Add distant choir pads, salt-stained reverb, and intermittent mechanical knocks for a tense, unraveling texture1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Salted Tension

tracks.rawText: 2:49Salted Tensionv5.5Dark nautical organ piece built around warped pipe-organ drones, detuned reed stops, and creaking low pedal tones, Unstable tape flutter, foghorn-like brass swells, sub-bass rumble, and sparse tom hits create a precarious drift, Add distant choir pads, salt-stained reverb, and intermittent mechanical knocks for a tense, unraveling texture2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Salted Tension

tracks.rawText: 2:19Cinder Symphonyv5.5Brooding orchestral score with low-string ostinatos, distorted taiko and bass drum hits, brass clusters, and pounding toms, Dissonant synth drones, hammered piano, tremolo violins, and swelled horn rises intensify the tension; granular sound design, deep sub-bass, cavernous reverb, and abrupt dropouts make the listener feel trapped4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Cinder Symphony
